https://nunababy.com/usa/all-products/tr.title: triv™ next
https://nunababy.com/usa/all-products/tr.description: A morning stroll to the park or afternoons in your favorite coffee spot, everyday out and abouts with baby are fuss-free with the TRIV™ next stroller. It’s a natural city dweller that quickly converts to a travel system, packs up easily and stands on its own when folded, becoming the perfect sidekick to your everyday adventures. Engineered for convenience and comfort, the all-wheel suspension, one-touch braking system, and large rear wheels promise easy maneuverability and cushiony smooth city strolls - like riding on air with complete peace of mind. This compact fold stroller is cleverly designed with a seat that faces and folds both ways, no matter what direction baby's facing. The all-season seat keeps your precious cargo snug in winter and converts to breathable mesh in summer.Every parent needs a trusty travel companion to enjoy those everyday adventures waiting around the corner.
